## Why It Works

This works because it strikes a chord. You either agree (which drives comments) or vehemently disagree with the statement. Both are fine because it creates good conversation in the comments section.

## Template

A simple observation about life:
The people who {Do hard, but good thing} will be much better {outcome} than those who are {Reverse of hard good thing}.
